mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voj_contests
contest_name LIKE "%"#{keyword}"%"
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voj_contests WHERE contest_start_time <= NOW() AND contest_end_time > NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO voj_contests (contest_name, contest_notes, contest_start_time, contest_end_time, contest_mode, contest_problems, contest_status, contest_scoring, contest_penalty, contest_freeze, contest_is_rated, contest_open_registration) VALUES (#{contestName}, #{contestNotes}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{contestMode}, #{problems}, #{status}, #{scoring}, #{penalty}, #{freeze}, #{isRated}, #{openRegistration})
